name: appysentinel
description: AppySentinel — per-machine, observer-only telemetry collector boilerplate

scripts.build: bun run --filter './packages/core' build && bun run --filter './packages/cli' build
scripts.test: bun run --filter '@appydave/*' test && bun run --filter 'create-appysentinel' test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter '@appydave/*' typecheck && bun run --filter 'create-appysentinel' typecheck
scripts.lint: bun run --filter '@appydave/*' lint && bun run --filter 'create-appysentinel' lint

author: David Cruwys
